parameters.query: SELECT cl.status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' GROUP BY cl.status ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT c.typeofcomplaint, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' AND (cl.status IS NULL OR cl.status NOT IN ('Closed','Resolved')) GROUP BY c.typeofcomplaint ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ve.closuredate) > 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical, SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ve.closuredate) BETWEEN 1 AND 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high, SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ve.closuredate) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS due_today, SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ve.closuredate) < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS future, SUM(CASE WHEN ve.closuredate IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_edc FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) LEFT JOIN vmm_vendorescalations ve ON ve.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_vendorescalations WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' AND (cl.status IS NULL OR cl.status NOT IN ('Closed','Resolved'))

SELECT c.id, c.complaintno, c.productname, c.typeofcomplaint, cs.storename AS store_name, cs.storecity AS city, ve.closuredate AS edc, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ve.closuredate) AS days_overdue, cl.status AS current_status FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintstores cs ON cs.id = c.storerefid LEFT JOIN vmm_vendorescalations ve ON ve.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_vendorescalations WHERE complaintid = c.id) LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' AND (cl.status IS NULL OR cl.status NOT IN ('Closed','Resolved')) AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ve.closuredate) > 0 ORDER BY days_overdue DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT cs.zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM vmm_complaints c LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintstores cs ON cs.id = c.storerefid LEFT JOIN vmm_complaintlogs cl ON cl.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM vmm_complaintlogs WHERE complaintid = c.id) WHERE c.is_deleted = 'No' AND (cl.status IS NULL OR cl.status NOT IN ('Closed','Resolved')) AND cs.zone IS NOT NULL AND cs.zone != '' GROUP BY cs.zone ORDER BY cnt DESC
